services.name: Summerville Medical Center (Roper St. Francis)
services.notes: Full-service community hospital, emergency department, orthopedics, cardiology. Part of Roper St. Francis Healthcare system.

sources.title: Roper St. Francis - Summerville Medical Center

services.name: MUSC Health - Medical University of South Carolina
services.notes: Top-tier academic medical center, Level 1 trauma center, nationally ranked specialties (cancer, cardiology, GI). 30-minute drive from Summerville.

services.name: Trident Medical Center
services.address: 9330 Medical Plaza Dr, North Charleston, SC 29406
services.notes: Large HCA hospital in North Charleston, Level 2 trauma center, cardiac surgery, stroke center. 15-minute drive from Summerville.

services.name: CVS Pharmacy - Summerville
services.notes: Drive-through, vaccinations, MinuteClinic inside. Open 7 days.

services.name: Walgreens Pharmacy - Summerville
services.notes: Drive-through pharmacy, vaccinations, photo services.

services.name: Publix Pharmacy - Summerville
services.notes: Free select generic medications (lisinopril, metformin, amlodipine, others). Convenient in-store pharmacy while grocery shopping.

services.name: Wells Fargo - Summerville
services.notes: Full-service branch with financial advisors, ATM, online/mobile banking. National bank with wide ATM network.

services.name: Bank of America - Summerville
services.notes: Full-service branch with financial advisors, ATM, Merrill Lynch wealth management. National bank with wide ATM network.

services.name: South State Bank - Summerville
services.notes: Regional bank headquartered in SC. Excellent local customer service, competitive rates. Strong community banking presence throughout the Lowcountry.

services.name: USPS - Summerville Post Office
services.notes: Full-service post office. PO boxes, package pickup, passport services. Mon-Fri 8:30-5, Sat 9-12.

services.name: South Carolina Legal Aid (Lowcountry Office)
services.notes: Free civil legal services for low-income residents. Covers housing, consumer, family law, public benefits. Serves Dorchester, Berkeley, and Charleston counties.

services.name: Roper St. Francis Primary Care - Summerville
services.notes: Primary care and internal medicine, accepting new patients, MyChart online portal. Part of Roper St. Francis network.

services.name: Summerville Family & Cosmetic Dentistry
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, accepts most insurance and dental discount plans.

services.name: Lowe's - Summerville
services.notes: Full home improvement store. Installation services for flooring, windows, doors, appliances. Pro referral network for contractors.

services.name: Home Depot - Summerville
services.notes: Home improvement, tool rental, installation services, contractor referrals.

services.name: Summerville Animal Hospital
services.notes: Full-service veterinary hospital, wellness exams, surgery, dental, boarding referrals.

services.name: Banfield Pet Hospital - Summerville PetSmart
services.notes: Inside PetSmart. Wellness plans available for routine care. Convenient for combined vet visit and pet supply shopping.

services.name: PetSmart Grooming - Summerville
services.notes: Walk-in and appointment grooming, self-serve wash stations. Large breed grooming available.

services.name: Camp Bow Wow - Summerville
services.notes: Doggy daycare and overnight boarding. Webcam access. Indoor and outdoor play areas. Large breed friendly.

services.name: Azalea Park
services.notes: Beautiful 12-acre park in downtown Summerville. Paved walking paths, butterfly garden, public art. Dogs welcome on leash. Hosts Flowertown Festival annually.

services.name: Charleston International Airport (CHS)
services.notes: Regional airport with direct flights to major US hubs (ATL, CLT, DFW, ORD, JFK, DCA). Southwest, Delta, American, United, JetBlue. 20-25 min drive from Summerville.

services.name: Planet Fitness - Summerville
services.notes: Budget gym, $10/mo basic membership. Open 24/5. Good for seniors on SilverSneakers or budget-conscious.

services.name: Summerville Baptist Church
services.notes: Large established church in downtown Summerville. Multiple Sunday services, active senior ministry, community outreach programs.

services.name: Kroger family of stores
services.notes: Largest US supermarket operator; regional banners (Ralphs, Fred Meyer, King Soopers, Smith's, Fry's, etc.).

services.name: Aldi
services.notes: Hard-discount supermarket chain — nationwide.

services.name: Best Buy
services.notes: Largest US consumer-electronics chain.

services.name: The Home Depot
services.notes: Largest US home-improvement chain.

attractions.name: Azalea Park & Sawmill Branch Trail
attractions.description: 12-acre downtown park with azalea gardens and connected multi-use trail for walking and cycling
attractions.frequency: Open daily, dawn to dusk. Flowertown Festival each April.

attractions.name: Givhans Ferry State Park
attractions.description: Lowcountry state park on the Edisto River with kayaking, camping, nature trails, and picnic areas

attractions.name: Historic Downtown Charleston
attractions.description: World-renowned historic district with Rainbow Row, The Battery, museums, galleries, and James Beard Award restaurants
attractions.frequency: Day trip, 30-min drive. Restaurants, shopping, and culture.

attractions.name: Folly Beach
attractions.description: Laid-back beach town south of Charleston with 6 miles of sandy beach, surfing, and the Folly Beach Pier
attractions.frequency: Day trip, ~45 min drive from Summerville. Free beach access, paid parking.

attractions.name: Middleton Place Plantation
attractions.description: National Historic Landmark with America's oldest landscaped gardens, house museum, and stableyards

attractions.name: Tanger Outlets - North Charleston
attractions.description: Outlet shopping center with 80+ stores, name-brand discounts

attractions.name: North Charleston Coliseum & Performing Arts Center
attractions.description: Major venue for concerts, shows, and events serving the greater Charleston area
attractions.frequency: Events throughout the year, check schedule

attractions.name: Cypress Gardens
attractions.description: 170-acre swamp garden with boat tours through blackwater cypress swamp, walking trails, butterfly house
attractions.frequency: Daily 9:00-17:00, boat tours included with admission
